languages.text: "Как ваши военные относятся к обвинениям в ереси?"
"How is your military responding to these accusations of heresy?"
languages.original_text: "Как ваши военные относятся к обвинениям в ереси?"

traits.locale_text: "How is your military responding to these accusations of heresy?"
"How is your military responding to these accusations of heresy?"
"How is your military responding to these accusations of heresy?"

languages.text: “你被指控为异端，你的军队对此有什么反应？”
languages.original_text: "How is your military responding to these accusations of heresy?"

traits.locale_text: “你被指控为异端，你的军队对此有什么反应？”

languages.text: « Comment votre armée réagit-elle à ces accusations d'hérésie ? »
languages.original_text: "How is your military responding to these accusations of heresy?"

traits.locale_text: « Comment votre armée réagit-elle à ces accusations d'hérésie ? »

languages.text: "Ordunun bu kâfirlik suçlamalarına karşı tepkisi nedir?"
languages.original_text: "How is your military responding to these accusations of heresy?"

traits.locale_text: "Ordunun bu kâfirlik suçlamalarına karşı tepkisi nedir?"

languages.text: «¿Cómo están reaccionando sus soldados a las acusaciones de herejía?».
languages.original_text: "How is your military responding to these accusations of heresy?"

traits.locale_text: «¿Cómo están reaccionando sus soldados a las acusaciones de herejía?».

languages.text: "Wie reagiert Eure Armee auf diesen Vorwurf der Ketzerei?"
languages.original_text: "How is your military responding to these accusations of heresy?"

traits.locale_text: "Wie reagiert Eure Armee auf diesen Vorwurf der Ketzerei?"

languages.text: 「軍は、この異端の罪状に対するどのように対応しているのですか」
languages.original_text: "How is your military responding to these accusations of heresy?"

traits.locale_text: 「軍は、この異端の罪状に対するどのように対応しているのですか」
